            id,
            workspace_id,
            started_at,
            completed_at,
            duration_ms,
            result,
            status,
            worker,
            fast_filter
        ) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $3, 0, $4, 'success'::job_status, 'debugger', 1::smallint)
